data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-22T14:59 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.thinking:
There are multiple completed patrol wisps stacking up. The hooked wisp (037x) is also fully complete. patrol_count is 9, no extraordinary action. Under 20, so I should loop.

I need to:
1. Squash the current completed wisps
2. Create a new patrol wisp
3. Execute the new patrol

Let me squash and create a new patrol.

content.text: Patrol count at 9, no extraordinary actions. All steps complete on stacked wisps. Squashing and creating fresh patrol.

input.description: Squash completed patrol wisps to digest
